description: Wo Hop To is a triad group based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong, founded in 1908 in Sai Ying Pun as a secret political organization opposing the Qing dynasty. It specializes in protection rackets and is affiliated with the Sun Yee On triad. During the early 1990s, it expanded into the United States, particularly San Francisco, where it controlled Chinatown illegal activities. It is one of the Four Major Gangs of Hong Kong.

country_links.evidence_quote: During the early 1990s, Wo Hop To expanded into the United States, beginning in San Francisco.
country_links.context: Wo Hop To expanded into the United States, beginning in San Francisco, and controlled Chinatown illegal activities there.
